arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively reveal that Tottenham and Newcastle United have both opened talks over a possible deal for Lens defender Abdukodir Khusanov. The two...

arts.ttl: Talks taking place: Ruben Amorim pushing for Man United to complete potential €18m transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim is reportedly pushing for the potential transfer of Barcelona defender Andreas Christensen. The Denmark international looks highly likely to leave Barca in the near future, with the current expectation being that he could leave on an initial loan with a view to a permanent €18m transfer. arts.ttl: Romano teases BOMBSHELL Man Utd transfer for top target
arts.sum: Manchester United target Milos Kerkez has signed with a new agency as he gears up for a 2025 transfer, according to Fabrizio Romano. However, the Red Devils did not have the necessary funds left over to strengthen that position and had to put off a transfer.

arts.ttl: How Man United could line up against Newcastle without Manuel Ugarte and Bruno Fernandes
arts.sum: Manchester United take on Newcastle United on Monday but they will be without Bruno Fernandes and Manuel Ugarte

arts.ttl: 'I saw the Man Utd dressing room hierarchy among players with my own eyes'
arts.sum: A lack of leadership in the Manchester United dressing room has hurt Ruben Amorim's start at the club - but one Old Trafford icon recounted how it can lead to players getting special treatment

arts.ttl: Six Man Utd players free to talk to overseas clubs on January 1 as Ruben Amorim faces headache
arts.sum: Manchester United have six players who will be free to talk to non-English clubs next month and the Red Devils will need to make some big decisions about their futures

arts.ttl: Man Utd flop Antony offered January ESCAPE ROUTE
arts.sum: Real Betis could launch another attempt at loaning Manchester United flop Antony in January, according to Spanish media. Man Utd flop Antony offered January ESCAPE ROUTE

arts.ttl: 'Unsellable' Man Utd duo earning similar money to Tom Heaton as 'issues' arise
arts.sum: Manchester United are facing further problems behind the scenes, with the club said to be struggling to pay two talented stars enough money despite reserve goalkeeper Tom Heaton's hefty contract

arts.ttl: “Of course, I like” – Player pleased with Manchester United links for January transfer
arts.sum: Real Sociedad’s Luka Sučić is aware of the reports linking him with a move to Manchester United. The Croatia international took advantage of the winter break and made a trip to Bosnia and Herzegovina. Sportske Novosti had a chat with the 22-year-old on a few topics, including the recent reports linking him to Manchester United.
